caption: A person's hands are shown sorting through a stack of sports cards. In the upper left, the person holds a small pile of cards. As the sequence progresses, they slide a card out from the deck to reveal more of the image. The cards feature athletes in action poses. A small picture-in-picture overlay in the lower portion of the scene shows a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt sitting in a chair. On-screen logos for "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible in the upper center and right. The background behind the cards is a dark, flat surface, while the area behind the man in the overlay shows a room with sports memorabilia and equipment. The hands move the cards fluidly, flipping through them to display different faces of the collectible cards.
